title: Vanilla plus QOL
description:
Optimized for Smooth Gameplay
Bamboo Now Functions Like Wood
New Uses for Copper
Stone Cutter Enhancements: Cuts all ores, stone, and wood
Includes Bare Bones Mod: Improved compatibility and fun animations for a trailer-like experience
body:
Discover this Minecraft 1.21 Modpack!

Experience Minecraft like never before with our carefully curated modpack, optimized for seamless gameplay. (Minimum 4GB memory required for a glitch-free experience)

# Key Features:
## Bamboo Revamp:

### New Uses:  Bamboo can now be used just like other wood types, adding versatility to your crafting options.
Expanded Copper Usage:

### Creative Potential: Discover innovative ways to incorporate copper into your builds and tools.
Enhanced Stone Cutter:

### Crafting Made Easy: The stone cutter now cuts all ores, stone, and wood, simplifying your crafting process and saving you time.
## Bonus Additions:
## Bare Bones Mods/resorce packs:
### Improved Compatibility: Includes resource packs and mods for a smoother gameplay experience.
### Fun Animations: Enjoy animations that bring your game closer to the high-quality look of the official trailers.
Dive into a new era of Minecraft with enhanced features, optimized performance, and exciting new uses for bamboo and copper. Craft, build, and explore with ease!
